basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior Field/Lab Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.post_name: Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper)
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the university. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the PAU Paani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged 18 to 63 years who have passed Middle with Punjabi are eligible to apply for these Paani Krishi Mitra vacancies. The application process for PAU Paani Krishi Mitra Recruitment 2026 is open, and eligible candidates can submit their applications offline on or before 12 June 2026. Candidates can download the offici

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 63 years

qualification.details: Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper): Middle with Punjabi. Preference will be given to the candidates who have been working as DPLs in the respective field in PAU for 10 years.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper)

salary_details.details: Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper): Rs. 12526/- (Rs. 11726 + Rs. 800 per month fixed)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Paani Krishi Mitra recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Paani Krishi Mitra posts at Punjab Agricultural University is 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Middle school education and possess knowledge of Punjabi to be eligible for the Paani Krishi Mitra position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to this recruitment is between 18 years and 63 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Paani Krishi Mitra post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Paani Krishi Mitra (Equivalent to Junior Field/Lab Helper) position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 100/- which should be submitted in the form of a bank draft in favour of Comptroller, Punjab Agricultural University, Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Paani Krishi Mitra position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 12526/- per month, which includes Rs. 11726/- basic pay and Rs. 800/- allowance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. When will the selection committee meet?
faq.answer: The selection committee will convene on 22nd June 2026 for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference given to existing workers?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have worked as DPLs in the respective field in PAU for 10 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be obtained from room no. 112 of the department against the payment of Rs. 100/-.
